-- stg.stg_meps_in_bank definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE stg.stg_meps_in_bank;

CREATE TABLE stg.stg_meps_in_bank (
	id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY( INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 1 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
	"uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
	cm_documents_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	line_number numeric(5) NOT NULL,
	bank_code varchar(4) NULL,
	bank_name varchar(40) NULL,
	bank_shortname varchar(15) NULL,
	autodebit_indicator bpchar(1) NULL,
	participant_indicator bpchar(1) NULL,
	"version" numeric(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT stg_meps_in_bank_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
	CONSTRAINT stg_meps_in_bank_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);
